接口 IBaseDocBuildTemplate

所有已知子接口:
IJavadocDocTemplate<T>, IRestDocTemplate
所有已知实现类:
GRpcDocBuildTemplate, JavadocDocBuildTemplate, JAXRSDocBuildTemplate, RpcDocBuildTemplate, SolonDocBuildTemplate, SpringBootDocBuildTemplate
public interface IBaseDocBuildTemplate
Base Doc Build Template

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    default List<ApiParam>
    buildReturnApiParams(DocJavaMethod docJavaMethod, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
    Build return api params
    default void
    convertParamsDataToTree(ApiMethodDoc apiMethodDoc)
    Convert params data to tree
    default List<DocJavaParameter>
    getJavaParameterList(ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, DocJavaMethod docJavaMethod, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
    Retrieves and processes the list of parameters for a given Java method, applying various transformations and ignoring specified parameters.
    default String
    getMethodReturnType(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod javaMethod, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
    Retrieves the simplified return type of a Java method, handling generic types and array notations.
    default String
    getRewriteClassName(Map<String,String> replacementMap, String fullTypeName, String commentClass)
    Retrieves the rewritten class name based on the provided map, full type name, and comment class.
    default Set<String>
    ignoreParamsSets(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method)
    Retrieves a set of parameter names to be ignored based on the `@ignoreParams` tag in the method's documentation.
    boolean
    ignoreReturnObject(String typeName, List<String> ignoreParams)
    Determines whether the return object should be ignored based on its type name and a list of ignored parameters.
    default String
    paramCommentResolve(String comment)
    Comment Resolve
    default String
    replaceTypeName(String type, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap, boolean simple)
    Replaces type names in the given string based on the provided map of actual types.

  • 方法详细资料

    • paramCommentResolve

      default String paramCommentResolve(String comment)
      Comment Resolve
      参数:
      comment - comment
      返回:
      String

    • buildReturnApiParams

      default List<ApiParam> buildReturnApiParams(DocJavaMethod docJavaMethod, ProjectDocConfigBuilder projectBuilder)
      Build return api params
      参数:
      docJavaMethod - JavaMethod
      projectBuilder - ProjectDocConfigBuilder
      返回:
      List

    • convertParamsDataToTree

      default void convertParamsDataToTree(ApiMethodDoc apiMethodDoc)
      Convert params data to tree
      参数:
      apiMethodDoc - ApiMethodDoc

    • getJavaParameterList

      default List<DocJavaParameter> getJavaParameterList(ProjectDocConfigBuilder builder, DocJavaMethod docJavaMethod, FrameworkAnnotations frameworkAnnotations)
      Retrieves and processes the list of parameters for a given Java method, applying various transformations and ignoring specified parameters.
      参数:
      builder - The project documentation configuration builder.
      docJavaMethod - The documented Java method.
      frameworkAnnotations - The framework annotations used to identify specific annotations.
      返回:
      A list of processed DocJavaParameter objects.

    • getRewriteClassName

      default String getRewriteClassName(Map<String,String> replacementMap, String fullTypeName, String commentClass)
      Retrieves the rewritten class name based on the provided map, full type name, and comment class.
      参数:
      replacementMap - The map containing replacements for class names.
      fullTypeName - The fully qualified type name.
      commentClass - The comment associated with the class, if any.
      返回:
      The rewritten class name or the original class name if no valid rewrite is found.

    • ignoreParamsSets

      default Set<String> ignoreParamsSets(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod method)
      Retrieves a set of parameter names to be ignored based on the `@ignoreParams` tag in the method's documentation.
      参数:
      method - The Java method to inspect for the ignore parameters tag.
      返回:
      A set of parameter names that should be ignored.

    • getMethodReturnType

      default String getMethodReturnType(com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaMethod javaMethod, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap)
      Retrieves the simplified return type of a Java method, handling generic types and array notations.
      参数:
      javaMethod - The Java method whose return type needs to be processed.
      actualTypesMap - A map containing actual type mappings.
      返回:
      The simplified return type as a string.

    • replaceTypeName

      default String replaceTypeName(String type, Map<String, com.thoughtworks.qdox.model.JavaType> actualTypesMap, boolean simple)
      Replaces type names in the given string based on the provided map of actual types.
      参数:
      type - The type name to be replaced.
      actualTypesMap - A map containing the actual types to be used for replacement.
      simple - A flag indicating whether to use simple names for replacement.
      返回:
      The type name after replacement.

    • ignoreReturnObject

      boolean ignoreReturnObject(String typeName, List<String> ignoreParams)
      Determines whether the return object should be ignored based on its type name and a list of ignored parameters.
      参数:
      typeName - The name of the type to check.
      ignoreParams - A list of parameter names that should be ignored.
      返回:
      true if the return object should be ignored; false otherwise.
